LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT OCEAN BIO-CHEM INC DBA STAR BRITE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE NOTICE AND CERTIFICATE OF MERIT COMPLIES WITH HEALTH & SAFETY CODE 25249.7(D.) THE ARGUMENT THAT THE COMPLAINT IMPROPERLY INCLUDES PRODUCTS OTHER THAN STAR BRITE LIQUID ELECTRICAL TAPE (BLACK), WHILE APPARENTLY CONCEDED BY THE PLAINTIFF, IS NONETHELESS NOT AMENABLE TO RESOLUTION ON A DEMURRER SINCE IT SEEKS TO ADJUDICATE LESS THAN AN ENTIRE CAUSE OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

POS OF MEMO OF P & A IN OPPOS. TO MTN TO CONSOLIDATE; DEC AND PROPOSED ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANT OCEAN BIO-CHEM INC DBA STAR BRITE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-519279 WITH CASE CGC-12-519280 FOR ALL PURPOSES IS DENIED. COMPLETE CONSOLIDATION IS PROPER ONLY WHEN "THE PARTIES ARE IDENTICAL AND THE CAUSES COULD HAVE BEEN JOINED." SANCHEZ V. SUERIOR. COURT (1988) 203 CAL APP. 3D 1391, 1396. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge Lee presiding. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: PETER MILJANICH, ESQ., 415.552.7272, FOR PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW; No other appearances.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFFF AS YOU SOW'S MOTION TO APPROVE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 664.6. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR2542.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2013 Set For Trial On Oct-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-519279 WITH CASE CGC-12-519280
Off Calendar Jan-28-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter R. Miljanich, Esq. of Shute Mihaly & Weinberger LLP, Tel. 415.552.7272, for plaintiff and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT OCEAN BIO-CHEM INC DBA STAR BRITE's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-519279 WITH CASE CGC-12-519280 for all purposes is denied. Complete consolidation is proper only when "the parties are identical and the causes could have been joined." Sanchez v. Suerior. Court (1988) 203 Cal App. 3d 1391, 1396. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-519279 WITH CASE CGC-12-519280
Off Calendar Dec-21-2012 Continued To Jan-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Continued To Feb-20-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: PETER MILJANICH, ESQ., SHUTE MIHALY & WEINBERGER, 415.552.7272, FOR PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT OCEAN BIO-CHEM INC DBA STAR BRITE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. The Notice and Certificate of Merit complies with Health & Safety Code 25249.7(d.) The argument that he Complaint improperly includes products other than Star brite Liquid Electrical Tape (Black), while apparently conceded by the Plaintiff, is nonetheless not amenable to resolution on a demurrer since it seeks to adjudicate less than an entire cause of action. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: PETER MILJANICH, ESQ., SHUTE MIHALY & WEINBERGER, 415.552.7272, FOR PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is denied. There is no prejudice to Plaintiff, who failed to have a default entered prior to the filing of the demurrer. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Continued To Nov-21-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
